---
title: "Workshop 3 - Research Culture: Bias, Inclusivity, and Equality in Science"
author: "PULSE TCDC"
date: March 12, 2026
---

::: {.callout-tip collapse="false"}

## ResearchComp competencies developed in this session

### Making an impact

```{=html}
<table>
    <tr>
        <th>Foundational</th>
        <th>Intermediate</th>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2" style="background-color: #D2C7D4">1. Participate in the publication process</th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>• Understands how academics communicate research results</td>
        <td> </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2" style="background-color: #D2C7D4">2. Disseminate results to the research community</th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>• Engages in knowledge exchange</td>
        <td>• Contributes to promoting the public understanding of own research area</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2" style="background-color: #D2C7D4">4. Communicate to the broad public</th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>• Understands and appreciates the value of engaging with the public</td>
        <td> </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2" style="background-color: #D2C7D4">7. Promote the transfer of knowledge </th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td> • Appreciates the importance of knowledge exchange within society</td>
        <td>• Contributes to knowledge exchange within society </td>
    </tr>
</table>

```

:::

### Structure



### Materials

<iframe style="border: none;" title="Iframe Example" src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1yEKvN3CYxQ7lWyrncOFWrSQTH-131KCT/preview" width="500" height="300" data-mce-fragment="1"></iframe>

<a class="inline_disabled" href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1yEKvN3CYxQ7lWyrncOFWrSQTH-131KCT/export/pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Workshop 3: Download PDF</a>
 



### Citation
The materials from this session are available for reuse under <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/" rel="CC-BY"><img src="img/CCBY4.0.png" alt="" height="20"/></a>

Please cite this material as:

>  Folkesson, K. and Schroeder, K. (2026). *SciLifeLab PULSE Transferrable Skills Training Workshop 3 - Research culture: Bias, Inclusivity, and Equality in Science*. Retrieved from https://scilifelab-training.github.io/PULSE/0001/workshop-s3.html. DOI: (pending)

If you use this material, we'd love to know! Get in touch with us at pulse.training@scilifelab.se
